sellers_note: Experience the pinnacle of electric driving with this exceptional 2024 Tesla Model Y Long Range. Meticulously maintained and boasting a low mileage of just 14,124, this vehicle is poised to deliver an unparalleled driving experience. - Memory seat - Power Liftgate - Lane Departure Warning System - Heated door mirrors - Heated steering wheel - Navigation System - Exterior Parking Camera Rear - Wheels: 19" x 9.5" Gemini Dark Indulge in the seamless performance and advanced technology that define the Tesla brand. This Model Y Long Range offers a captivating blend of power, efficiency, and cutting-edge features to elevate your daily commute and weekend adventures. Discover the joy of effortless acceleration, precise handling, and the unmatched convenience of an all-electric drivetrain. With a city MPGe of 122 and a highway MPGe of 112, this vehicle delivers exceptional energy efficiency and a reduced environmental impact. Immerse yourself in the premium audio experience with the 14-speaker sound system, complete with radio data system and audio memory. Stay connected and informed with the intuitive navigation system and the array of driver-assistive technologies, including the Lane Departure Warning System and Exterior Parking Camera Rear. Elevate your comfort with the heated steering wheel, heated front and rear seats, and the power-adjustable driver's seat with memory function. The vegan leather seating trim and genuine wood dashboard insert add a touch of sophisticated style to the meticulously crafted interior. This 2024 Tesla Model Y Long Range is a testament to the brand's commitment to innovation and excellence. Experience the future of electric mobility and schedule a test drive today. We look forward to welcoming you to our dealership and assisting you in discovering the perfect vehicle to elevate your driving experience. We are open 24/7 to serve you.Test Drives delivered to you.
